history.content:
<thought>
I am at the bottom-center of the view, facing north (upward). The cell directly in front of me (row 5, col 3) is lava `L`, which is deadly. To my left (row 6, col 2) is a wall `#`. To my right (row 6, col 4) is an empty floor `.`. Since moving forward is fatal, I should turn right to face the safe floor cell to my right, so I can then move forward in that direction to continue exploring towards the goal `G` visible at (row 4, col 5).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at the bottom-center of the 7x7 view, facing north (up). The cell directly in front (row 6, col 4) is a safe floor `.`. The cell to the left (row 7, col 3) is deadly lava `L`, and to the right (row 7, col 5) is a wall `#`. Therefore, moving forward is safe and progresses toward the goal `G` visible to the northwest (row 5, col 2). I will move forward to the open floor cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is at (5,1). The agent faces north; the cell directly ahead (5,3) is safe floor, but from there the north cell (4,3) is a wall and the west cell (5,2) is lava, making that path a dead end. The cell to the left (west) of the agent is safe floor (6,2), and moving west twice leads to (6,1), which is directly south of the goal with a safe floor path north. Therefore, turning left to face west is the first step.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is visible at row 5, column 5. The agent is at row 7, column 4 facing north. The cell directly ahead (row 6, col 4) is safe floor, and beyond it (row 5, col 4) is also safe floor, adjacent to the goal. Moving forward is safe and progresses directly toward the goal. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (7,4) facing north. The cell directly ahead (6,4) is safe floor (`.`), while left (7,3) and right (7,5) are lava. Moving forward is the only safe immediate action and moves closer to the goal at (6,5). I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is directly to my right (east). I will turn right to face it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is directly in front of me (north). Moving forward will reach the goal and win, and the cell is safe. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
